About

The person behind the work.

I'm Thwvy — a graphic designer and motion artist who loves turning simple ideas into visuals that feel real and alive.

I work across graphic design, 3D modeling, and motion animation. Every project is built with clean thinking and a focus on what actually looks great.

Open to freelance projects and creative collaborations.
